name: pidev
description: pi is a self-extensible AI coding agent harness. The base install is lean; functionality is added via packages (web UI, knowledge base, chat integrations) installed at runtime with 'pi install'.

notes.text: pi itself has no web UI; this container exposes the interactive agent through ttyd in the browser on port 7681. A provider API key (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, or GITHUB_TOKEN) is required and stored in /opt/pidev/pi.env.

Extend pi with packages at runtime via 'pi install npm:<pkg>'. Useful examples: context-mode (SQLite knowledge base/RAG, no external DB), pi-intercom (Slack/Discord bridge), pi-hermes-memory (persistent memory), pi-mcp-adapter (connect MCP servers).
Browser access uses ttyd, which has no authentication by default. Restrict port 7681 with a reverse proxy or firewall before exposing it publicly.
